creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
The usual thing is to just list it, we'll go ahead and put it in the commit message.  This'll look like so:

    https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=00875c7b06744b3fc558a89abdacf49d8a40be3f


Please also note that your update seems to have reverted my build fixes for riscv64:

    https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=48996f859be1723b58a37393407d41651dd31b28


Please re-adjust the dependencies to versions new enough to build on riscv64.  The versions of the dependencies you chose are likely too outdated to support riscv64 on FreeBSD.

If you could bump the dependencies in your go.mod upstream, that would be even better.
